games.title: Drive Mad
games.description: Drive Mad is a car game where you drive on a track filled with obstacles. Your goal is to reach the finish line in one piece.
Join the numbers and get to the 2048 tile!

games.title: Hextris
games.description: A fast-paced puzzle game inspired by Tetris.

games.title: Slope
games.description: Navigate a ball through a 3D isometric course.

games.title: Doodle Jump
games.description: Jump as high as you can in this classic platformer.

games.title: Google Pacman
games.description: The classic Google Doodle Pacman game.
